company: Agensi Pekerjaan KELLY OCG Sdn Bhd
description: Job Recruitment: Software Development Engineer Job Title Software Development Engineer Job Responsibilities · Participate in software development related to optical modules, complete MCU development work combined with industry characteristics and CMIS5 protocol, connect with software services such as switches, and ensure the collaborative adaptation of product software and hardware. · Be responsible for the full-stack development (front-end + back-end) of the optical module test data management system, lead the implementation of PC/web applications, adapt to core business scenarios including data collection, statistical analysis, and automated reporting, collaborate with data engineers to complete the data link closed-loop, and ensure the system meets the actual needs of optical module testing services. · Undertake front-end interface development and optimization, build concise and efficient visual interactive interfaces based on the Python tech stack (Streamlit preferred) or mainstream front-end frameworks, support core operations such as data import, statistical result display, and report download, ensure multi-browser and multi-terminal compatibility, and improve user experience. · Collaborate with data engineers to iterate core functions including data visualization and automated reporting, support the development and integration of extended functions such as data anomaly monitoring and batch operations, to meet the evolving business requirements. Job Requirements · Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, Electronic Information, Software Engineering or related majors; candidates with 1–3 years or more of relevant software development experience in the high-speed optical module industry are preferred. · Proficient in C language for MCU (STM32) development, with solid MCU programming fundamentals, able to independently complete the development and debugging of relevant modules. · Familiar with the development process in the Linux environment, with programming, debugging and troubleshooting capabilities under Linux. · Possess full-stack development capabilities: proficient in the Python tech stack (Streamlit preferred) or mainstream front-end frameworks (e.g., Vue, React) for the front-end; familiar with API interface design and development for the back-end, able to independently complete collaborative front-end and back-end development. · Familiar with the characteristics of the high-speed optical module industry, master the CMIS5 protocol; candidates with relevant optical module software development experience are preferred. · Familiar with switch-related software services, understand the collaborative working logic between optical modules and switches; candidates with relevant business docking experience are preferred. · Have good coding standards, logical thinking and troubleshooting skills, able to independently solve technical difficulties in the development process. · Excellent communication and collaboration skills, strong sense of responsibility, able to actively cooperate with the team to complete project delivery; possess strong learning ability and stress resistance, willing to embrace new technologies and challenges in the industry. · Experience working with switches or similar equipment. · Ability to speak English and Mandarin (to liaise with the larger global team based in China).
